title: orchis incarnata subsp. sesquipedalis
intro: Orchis incarnata subsp. sesquipedalis, also known as the American Lady's Slipper or large yellow lady's slipper, is a type of orchid native to North America. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Orchis incarnata subsp. sesquipedalis include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into tinctures, infusions, or salves for topical and internal use.
